data.title: International Energy Agency chief: The current crisis is more severe than the combined crises of 1973, 1979, and 2002.
data.description: The head of the International Energy Agency stated that the current crisis is more severe than the combined crises of 1973, 1979, and 2002, and the world has never experienced an energy supply disruption of this scale. (Cointelegraph)

data.title: South Fund Management Warns of Premium Risk in Hong Kong Stock Connect 50 ETF
data.description: South Fund Management Co., Ltd. has issued a notice regarding its South China Securities Hong Kong Stock Connect 50 Exchange-Traded Fund (ETF), traded under the code 159126. According to Jin10, the secondary market trading price of this ETF has significantly exceeded its reference net asset value, resulting in a substantial premium. Investors are advised to be cautious of the premium risk in secondary market trading prices, as blind investment could lead to significant losses.

data.title: Global Energy Crisis Exceeds Historical Disruptions, Says IEA Chief
data.description: The head of the International Energy Agency (IEA) has stated that the current energy crisis is more severe than the crises of 1973, 1979, and 2002 combined. According to NS3.AI, the IEA chief emphasized that the world has never faced an energy supply disruption of this magnitude.

data.title: Xianyu Offers Cost-Effective Alternative to OpenClaw in China
data.description: Xianyu is emerging as a cost-effective local alternative to OpenClaw in China. According to NS3.AI, tasks on Xianyu reportedly cost less than 1% of OpenClaw's daily token spending. The platform boasts over 217 million monthly active users and generates more than 1 billion yuan in daily gross merchandise value (GMV). Xianyu's services extend beyond second-hand trading, offering a diverse range of categories.

data.title: Polymarket users have approximately $1.25 billion in wallet funds, which can generate $54 million in interest income annually.
data.description: In a post on X, Defillama founder 0xngmi commented on the news that "Polymarket will launch its own stablecoin," stating, "Polymarket users have approximately $1.25 billion in their wallets. If they retain this interest income, at current interest rates, they will earn an additional $54 million annually."

data.title: Goldman Sachs Highlights Investment Opportunity in Tech Stocks Amid Low Valuations
data.description:
Goldman Sachs has identified a potential investment opportunity in technology stocks, including those in the U.S. market, due to their current low valuations following a period of underperformance. According to Odaily, the tech sector has experienced one of its weakest relative returns in 50 years. Since 2025, several factors have contributed to the sector's relative weakness, prompting investors to shift towards value stocks. These factors include the launch of DeepSeek, significant capital expenditures by U.S. mega-cap companies, and the disruptive impact of AI-driven software.

Despite these challenges, the sector continues to offer strong growth rates at lower valuations. The valuation premium of U.S. mega-cap companies has decreased, aligning more closely with other parts of the sector. Globally, the price-to-earnings ratio of the IT sector has fallen below that of consumer discretionary, consumer staples, and industrial sectors.

Goldman Sachs notes that despite the low valuations, the earnings performance of the tech sector remains robust. Within the S&P 500 index, the IT sector is expected to see a 44% growth in earnings per share for Q1, accounting for 87% of the index's earnings per share growth.

data.title: NBA Regular Season: Heat vs. Raptors Prediction Market Activity Surges
data.description:
A significant transaction has occurred in the Polymarket prediction market concerning the NBA regular season game between the Miami Heat and the Toronto Raptors. According to Odaily, an account named beetlepimp has invested over $130,000, betting that the total score will exceed 238.5 points, with an average purchase price of 52 cents per share, totaling 260,160.4 shares.

The game is scheduled to start at 7:30 PM UTC+8 tomorrow. As the NBA regular season nears its conclusion, the Miami Heat holds a record of 41 wins and 37 losses, placing them 10th in the Eastern Conference. Meanwhile, the Toronto Raptors have a record of 43 wins and 35 losses, securing the 6th position in the Eastern Conference.

data.title: Global Wafer Foundry Industry Faces Price Surge Amid Chip Inflation
data.description: On April 7, Jin10 reported that investors inquired on an interactive platform about the potential for price increases in the global wafer foundry industry due to the spread of storage chip inflation. In response, Huahong Company stated that it formulates pricing strategies based on customer demand and market dynamics. The company aims to enhance average sales prices through a combination of product mix, new product iterations, and price adjustments. According to Jin10, Huahong noted that its average sales prices have already increased over the past few quarters, driven by a structural recovery in downstream demand.

data.title: Bitcoin(BTC) Surpasses 69,000 USDT with a Narrowed 0.31% Decrease in 24 Hours
data.description: On Apr 07, 2026, 09:09 AM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, Bitcoin has crossed the 69,000 USDT benchmark and is now trading at 69,076.007813 USDT, with a narrowed narrowed 0.31% decrease in 24 hours.

data.title: Market Predicts Federal Reserve to Maintain Rates in April
data.description: According to recent data from Kalshi, the market anticipates a 98% probability that the Federal Reserve will keep interest rates unchanged in April. According to Foresight News, there is a 2% chance of a 25 basis point rate cut. The prediction market has seen a trading volume exceeding $10 million.

data.title: An account with a winning percentage over 57% has bet over $130,000 in an NBA regular season game between the Heat and the Raptors, with a total score exceeding 238.5.
data.description: Odaily Seer's monitoring shows that beetlepimp (0x0767aa79d578aead1c849fd9f0fdc6cdb50336b0), an account with a prediction win rate exceeding 57% on Polymarket, has placed over $130,000 bets on the NBA regular season game between the Heat and the Raptors, predicting a total score of over 238.5. The average bet price was 52¢, and the total shares bet were 260,160.4. The NBA regular season game between the Heat and the Raptors will start tomorrow at 7:30 AM Beijing time. The NBA regular season is currently nearing its end. The Heat have a record of 41 wins and 37 losses, ranking 10th in the Eastern Conference; the Raptors have a record of 43 wins and 35 losses, ranking 6th in the Eastern Conference. Odaily Seer continues to monitor the prediction market, seeing changes before prices are set.

data.title: Analysts: Rising oil prices may become a more structural driver of inflation.
data.description: Analysts at First Abu Dhabi Bank stated in a report that strong oil prices have been and will continue to be (at least in the short term) a more structural driver of inflationary pressures. The analysts pointed out that inflationary pressures have led to a sell-off in interest rates as expectations of central bank rate cuts have faded. Previously, the market had anticipated two to three rate cuts by the Federal Reserve this year, but these expectations have been ruled out. LSEG data shows that the money market currently expects US policy rates to remain largely unchanged in 2026, with a very slight tightening bias. The market has even priced in a more hawkish rate hike scenario by the European Central Bank and the Bank of England by the end of this year, with increases of 74 basis points and 56 basis points respectively, "largely a result of imported energy inflation in Europe." (Jinshi)

data.title: Italy's Central Bank Lowers Economic Growth Forecasts for 2026 and 2027
data.description: Italy's central bank has revised its economic growth forecasts, reducing the expected growth rate for 2026 from 0.7% to 0.4%, and for 2027 from 0.9% to 0.6%. According to Jin10, these adjustments reflect a more cautious outlook on Italy's economic performance in the coming years.

data.title: Funds from Drift Exploit Transferred to New Wallet
data.description: According to Foresight News, monitoring by Arkham has revealed that the individual exploiting the Drift vulnerability is actively moving funds. They have recently transferred SOL valued at $14,800 to a new wallet.

data.title: Starknet Advances to Fourth Phase with Enhanced Privacy and Bitcoin Integration
data.description:
StarkWare has announced that Starknet has officially entered its fourth phase, aiming to create a faster, more decentralized, and private network while strengthening its connection with Bitcoin. According to Odaily, this phase highlights the introduction of the STRK20 framework, which supports ERC20 privacy features, and the strkBTC asset, enabling privacy-focused transactions with native Bitcoin exchange options. Additionally, Starknet v0.15.0 will introduce decentralized block verification, and Staking v3 and v4 will gradually achieve full network decentralization.

Starknet is also advancing the Bitcoin OP_CAT upgrade to enable trustless settlement and exploring additional Bitcoin bridging solutions such as BitVM and ColliderVM to foster Bitcoin DeFi development on Starknet. The S-two validator will further optimize client proof verification, enhancing network scalability and privacy protection. Starknet is committed to achieving comprehensive quantum security, preparing for the post-quantum computing era in blockchain and Bitcoin.

data.title: Analysts Highlight Oil Prices as Key Inflation Driver
data.description: On April 7, analysts from Abu Dhabi's First Bank reported that strong oil prices have become and will continue to be a significant structural driver of inflation, at least in the short term. According to Jin10, the analysts noted that inflationary pressures have led to a sell-off in interest rates, as expectations for central bank rate cuts have diminished. Previously, the market anticipated that the Federal Reserve would cut rates two to three times this year, but these expectations have been dismissed. LSEG data indicates that the currency market currently expects U.S. policy rates to remain largely unchanged in 2026, with a slight tightening bias. The market has even factored in more hawkish rate hike scenarios for the European Central Bank and the Bank of England by the end of this year, with increases of 74 basis points and 56 basis points, respectively. This is largely attributed to Europe's imported energy inflation.

data.title: Parity Reports on Profitability of Polymarket Traders
data.description:
Parity, a data platform for prediction markets, recently shared insights on X platform regarding the profitability of traders on Polymarket. According to Odaily, 31% of traders on Polymarket are in a profitable state. The platform has approximately 2.43 million users.

Among these users, 0.0043% (104 accounts) have profits exceeding $1 million. Accounts with profits ranging from $100,000 to $1 million make up 0.05% (1,165 accounts). Those with profits between $10,000 and $100,000 account for 0.4% (9,654 accounts).

Additionally, 2.23% (54,127 accounts) have profits between $1,000 and $10,000, while 5.24% (127,342 accounts) have profits ranging from $100 to $1,000. The largest group, 23.09% (561,422 accounts), have profits between $0 and $100.

On the other hand, accounts with losses exceeding $1 million constitute only 0.0033%, involving 88 users.

data.title: UBS Adjusts S&P 500 Target Points for 2026
data.description: UBS has revised its target points for the S&P 500 index for June and December 2026. According to ChainCatcher, the target for June 2026 has been lowered from 7,300 points to 7,000 points, while the target for December 2026 has been adjusted from 7,700 points to 7,500 points.

data.title: Whale Expands Position in GOLD Futures, Faces Minor Loss
data.description:
A significant cryptocurrency investor, identified by the address starting with 0x06a, has expanded its position in GOLD futures, according to ChainCatcher. The investor increased their holdings to $13.2 million at an average price of $4,677, currently experiencing a slight unrealized loss of approximately $43,000, or 3.4%. This makes the investor the largest long position holder in GOLD on Hyperliquid.

Previously, this address opened a GOLD futures position worth $10.3 million, achieving a profit of around $417,000 before closing the position after approximately 230 hours.

data.title: Hungarian Foreign Minister: U.S.-Hungary Relations Enter New 'Golden Era'
data.description: Hungarian Foreign Minister Péter Szijjártó stated that the visit by U.S. Vice President Vance signifies a new 'golden era' in U.S.-Hungary relations. According to Jin10, Szijjártó emphasized the importance of the visit in strengthening diplomatic ties between the two nations. He noted that the discussions held during the visit focused on enhancing cooperation in various sectors, including trade and security. The Hungarian Foreign Minister expressed optimism about the future of bilateral relations, highlighting the mutual benefits of increased collaboration. The visit marks a significant step in fostering closer ties between Hungary and the United States, paving the way for further diplomatic and economic engagements.
